title: 美国两机构严限学者与外国合著论文，有外国署名就得删 | 原文
content: NIH and NASA are imposing stricter restrictions on U.S. researchers collaborating with foreign institutions. Researchers must obtain pre-approval to publish papers with foreign co-authors, even if all experiments were conducted domestically. NIH has instructed some grantees to remove published papers with foreign collaborators from annual progress reports, while NASA warned that collaborations with Chinese researchers may violate regulations. These requirements were communicated through private emails, causing confusion among scientists.

title: Why $1B Exits are Dead
content: a16z's David George and VenCap's David Clark discuss how AI is transforming venture capital and tech. AI companies scale faster than previous startups, with potential outcomes exceeding investor expectations. They cover frontier models, coding agents, open source competition, data center limits, and value distribution in the AI ecosystem. These shifts mean larger company outcomes, faster value creation, and greater difficulty identifying durable winners in a rapidly evolving market.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (David George, David Clark)

title: Claude Opus 4.8 来了，但它说它是 qwen
content: Claude Opus 4.8 was released, now supporting hundreds of sub-agents per session. However, due to heavy distillation of open-source models like Qwen, it reportedly suffers self-identity confusion, identifying as Qwen when asked. Users note non-programming tasks feel inferior to version 4.6, and suggest waiting for the upcoming Mythos model instead.

title: 马斯克：SpaceX 与 Anthropic 达成的 Colossus AI 租赁协议仅为期六个月
content: SpaceX CEO Musk stated the Colossus AI training data center cluster lease to Anthropic is initially six months, though potentially extendable. Earlier reports indicated Anthropic would pay $1.25 billion monthly for computing access through May 2029. Musk clarified it is a 180-day rental with 90-day termination notice by either party, noting SpaceX may reclaim resources if computing availability becomes constrained.

title: Meta 将推出 AI 聊天机器人订阅服务 月费最低 7.99 美元
content: Meta will launch an AI chatbot subscription service with two tiers: Meta One Plus at $7.99 monthly for users frequently generating images, video, and using complex reasoning; and Meta One Premium at $19.99 for identical features with higher usage limits. The move aims to offset substantial AI investments.
